response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content. 2. Identified the song in the first scene (00:00-00:43) as 'DARK ARIA <LV2>' sung by IRyS. 3. Used the search tool to find the official lyrics for 'DARK ARIA' by Hiroyuki Sawano (the original artist). 4. Mapped the identified song to the scene. 5. Constructed the JSON object according to the requirements.
response.global_summary: IRyS performs a vocal set in her 2025 Birthday Live event. The video includes musical performances, stage talk, and promotional announcements for her new EP.

scenes.description: IRyS performs the song 'DARK ARIA <LV2>' on stage in a 3D concert environment.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
The time has come to pack away all the joys
You don't wanna hear my apology
Get it off my chest
I would do my best
I know what you fear
Similarities we possess
Never will I pass the test
The scene is fading
Can my soul be put to rest?
Death is gonna come for me
Be the change I couldn't be
Can you find a life that's like fairytales?

Far from this tragedy
Sad you had to wait for me
Feels like an eternity
Please forgive me for my sins
Angels wings lifting and setting me free
Death is gonna come for me
Be the change I couldn't be
Can you find a life that's like fairytales?

Far from this tragedy
Sad you had to wait for me
Feels like an eternity
Please forgive me for my sins
Angels wings lifting and setting me free
The question of my love
Slipping right through the cracks and crumbling to dust
